features.evidence: This phone quality is the best I have ever seen, super fast speed wise, screen size is perfect and not too heavy and I recommend this phone to everyone. this is the first where I've ended up with dead pixels on the side and bottom of my display within a year of owning the device.
value: display pixel density: 460 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)
